query:
SELECT 
  id, 
  demandId, 
  workerId, 
  scheduledStart,
  scheduledEnd,
  status
FROM assignments 
WHERE DATE(scheduledStart) = '2026-02-14'
LIMIT 10;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2iEKifVQ9gKtEas.9cbf5414b428 --database CMgr35KntT8tLtgpfJPejw --execute SELECT

  scheduledStart,
  scheduledEnd,
